message:
feat(frankenterm-web): add coordinate guard for stale-geometry detection during rescale (bd-2vr05.15.1.5)

Add CoordinateGuard with geometry-versioned validation for pointer/mouse/touch
coordinates. Provides ValidatedCellCoord (exact/clamped resolution), versioned
stale-detection, pixel→cell and CSS→cell transforms with DPR handling. Prevents
stale coordinates from mapping to wrong cells during in-flight geometry changes.
37 unit tests covering bounds, versioning, pixel mapping, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
